details.question: 장르별 트랙 수를 많은 순으로 알려줘

details.question: 미디어 타입별 트랙 수를 알려줘
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  mt.Name,
  COUNT(t.TrackId)
FROM MediaType AS mt
JOIN Track AS t
  ON mt.MediaTypeId = t.MediaTypeId
GROUP BY
  mt.Name;

details.question: 담당 직원별 고객 수를 알려줘

details.error:
(pymysql.err.OperationalError) (1305, 'FUNCTION Chinook_AutoIncrement.STRFTIME does not exist')
[SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) AS `InvoiceCount`,
       SUM(`Total`) AS `TotalSales`
FROM `Invoice`
WHERE STRFTIME('%%Y', `InvoiceDate`) = '2009']
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/e3q8)

details.question: 가장 많이 팔린 트랙 TOP 10을 알려줘
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  `Track`.`Name`
FROM `Track`
JOIN `InvoiceLine`
  ON `Track`.`TrackId` = `InvoiceLine`.`TrackId`
GROUP BY
  `Track`.`Name`
ORDER BY
  SUM(`InvoiceLine`.`Quantity`) DESC
LIMIT 10;

details.question: 총 재생 시간이 가장 긴 앨범 TOP 5를 알려줘
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  `Album`.`Title`
FROM `Album`
JOIN `Track`
  ON `Album`.`AlbumId` = `Track`.`AlbumId`
GROUP BY
  `Album`.`AlbumId`
ORDER BY
  SUM(`Track`.`Milliseconds`) DESC
LIMIT 5;

details.question: 한 번도 팔리지 않은 트랙은 몇 개인가요?
details.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `Track` WHERE `TrackId` NOT IN (SELECT `TrackId` FROM `InvoiceLine`);

details.question: 모든 직원의 이름과 상사 이름을 함께 보여줘
details.generated_sql: SELECT e.`FirstName` || ' ' || e.`LastName` AS EmployeeName, m.`FirstName` || ' ' || m.`LastName` AS ManagerName FROM `Employee` AS e LEFT JOIN `Employee` AS m ON e.`ReportsTo` = m.`EmployeeId`;

details.question: 고객별 총 구매금액과 구매 횟수 TOP 10을 알려줘
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  `c`.`CustomerId`,
  `c`.`FirstName`,
  `c`.`LastName`,
  SUM(`i`.`Total`) AS `TotalPurchaseAmount`,
  COUNT(`i`.`InvoiceId`) AS `PurchaseCount`
FROM `Customer` AS `c`
JOIN `Invoice` AS `i`
  ON `c`.`CustomerId` = `i`.`CustomerId`
GROUP BY
  `c`.`CustomerId`, `c`.`FirstName`, `c`.`LastName`
ORDER BY
  `TotalPurchaseAmount` DESC
LIMIT 10;

details.question: 2009년에 발행된 청구서 건수와 총 매출은?
details.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(`InvoiceId`), SUM(`Total`) FROM `Invoice` WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', `InvoiceDate`) = '2009'
details.corrected_sql:
SELECT COUNT(`InvoiceId`),
       SUM(`Total`)
FROM `Invoice`
WHERE YEAR(`InvoiceDate`) = '2009'
